product: AI Runtime is now in Public Preview
tagline: Designed for deep learning workloads, AI Runtime brings GPU support to Databricks serverless compute.
what_it_does: Designed for deep learning workloads, AI Runtime brings GPU support to Databricks serverless compute. AI Runtime for single node tasks is now in Public Preview. The distributed training API for multi GPU workloads remain in Beta.
why_it_matters: You can use AI Runtime to train and fine tune custom models using your favorite frameworks and get state of the art efficiency, performance, and quality.
plain_summary: Designed for deep learning workloads, AI Runtime brings GPU support to Databricks serverless compute. AI Runtime for single node tasks is now in Public Preview.
key_takeaway: Designed for deep learning workloads, AI Runtime brings GPU support to Databricks serverless compute.
